hero.title: Build Scalable APIs with Symfony & Modern PHP
hero.text: Learn how to design, build, and deploy secure, scalable REST APIs using Symfony and modern PHP. Understand real backend architecture, authentication systems, and production-ready workflows used in professional environments.
hero.imageAlt: Backend developer designing APIs with Symfony and PHP

courseFormats.heading: Backend Learning Paths
courseFormats.subheading: From core PHP fundamentals to production-grade APIs, security, and deployment workflows.

formats.title: Backend Essentials
features: Modern PHP fundamentals and syntax
Object-oriented programming and clean code principles
HTTP fundamentals and REST API basics
Working with JSON and request/response lifecycle
Debugging and error handling fundamentals
Best for beginners entering backend development

formats.title: Symfony API Development
features: Building REST APIs using Symfony framework
Routing, controllers, services, and dependency injection
Database integration with Doctrine ORM and migrations
Validation, serialization, and structured responses
API architecture and clean project organization
Best for developers building real backend applications

formats.title: Production Backend Engineering
features: Authentication and authorization (JWT, roles, permissions)
Security best practices and common vulnerability prevention
Error handling, logging, and monitoring strategies
Docker, environment configuration, and deployment workflows
Scalability, performance, and maintainability patterns
Best for developers aiming for production-level backend skills

priceOffers.heading: Backend Plans
priceOffers.subheading: Select the level of backend depth, architecture knowledge, and production readiness you want to achieve.

offers.title: Backend Foundations
features: Core PHP and object-oriented programming
Introduction to REST APIs and HTTP fundamentals
Basic Symfony project structure overview
Guided exercises and mini backend projects
Community support channel
Access to learning materials and recordings

offers.title: Symfony API Developer
features: Complete Symfony API development workflow
Doctrine ORM, database design, and migrations
Authentication and API security fundamentals
Hands-on backend projects with real use cases
Code reviews and mentor feedback
Certificate of completion for your portfolio

offers.title: Backend Production Pro
features: Advanced API architecture and scalable design patterns
Secure authentication and authorization systems
Docker, CI/CD, and deployment pipelines
Performance optimization and monitoring strategies
1:1 mentorship sessions and project reviews
Career guidance for backend roles and interviews

teachers.name: Thomas Richter
teachers.title: Symfony Backend Lead
teachers.description: Thomas designs and maintains large-scale backend systems using Symfony and modern PHP. He focuses on teaching clean architecture, reliable APIs, and production-ready backend practices.

teachers.name: Isabel Costa
teachers.title: API & Security Engineer
teachers.description: Isabel specializes in secure API design, authentication, and authorization. She helps students understand real-world security challenges and how to build robust backend systems.
teachers.imageAlt: Isabel Costa, API and security engineer

teachers.name: Jonas Weber
teachers.title: DevOps & Backend Mentor
teachers.description: Jonas brings strong experience in Docker, CI/CD, and cloud deployments. He teaches how to move Symfony applications from development to stable production environments.
teachers.imageAlt: Jonas Weber, DevOps and backend mentor
